metadata.source: Kharagpur Central Bank, Branch Code: KC-127
metadata.account_holder: Arjun Roy (Joint Account with Priya Roy)

content: Transaction Summary: - 2023-08-02: NEFT transfer of ₹2,50,000 from Priya Roy’s personal account (ending 5578) to Bharat Life Insurance (Policy #BLI-77892). - 2023-08-03: No cash deposit recorded. Claimed cash payment is false. - 2023-08-14, 06:30 AM: Cash withdrawal of ₹4,20,000 from joint account by Priya Roy. - 2023-08-14, 07:15 AM: ₹3,00,000 deposited into account ending 9912 (unregistered account). - 2023-08-15: ₹1,20,000 transferred to Durgapur-based account under name 'R. Choudhary'. - Outstanding loan: ₹18 lakhs owed to 'Shree Ganesh Loan & Finance' (loan shark), secured against family home. - Arjun Roy’s last salary deposit: ₹45,000 on July 28, 2023. Conclusion: Significant financial distress. Large withdrawal immediately after death. Funds transferred to suspected accomplice. Insurance premium paid via NEFT, not cash as claimed.
